key_findings: tRPC error format (code:-32600, BAD_REQUEST) also causes SILENT RESET
Mistral frontend swallows tRPC errors without showing any UI feedback
Page returns to initial home screen with Mistral logo
This confirms: Mistral's error handling silently resets for most error types
Only #322 (NDJSON v1 with array + h2_mode=2) produced visible Error 6002

recommendation: Only #322 approach (NDJSON v1 with outer array + h2_mode=2 keep-alive) produces visible error. All other formats cause silent reset. The ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR in #322 was likely from a follow-up request failing, not the main response. Focus on: (1) exactly replicating #322 conditions and varying NDJSON content to get chat message rendering, (2) investigating if Error 6002 can be customized, (3) alternative: APF redirect approach like Grok.
